## Key Events

### Fleet v2026.4.25 Bump (21:17 HKT)
- `OPENCLAW_VERSION` in Dockerfile changed from `2026.4.23` → `2026.4.25`
- This supersedes the "pending upgrade" entry in MEMORY.md
- Redeploy across all agents needed for v4.25 to take effect
- v4.25 was previously listed as "pre-release/beta" — bump happened same day, likely stable now

### Fleet v4.23 Fixes Documented
- Supervisor added to Dockerfile apt-get — fixes healthcheck failure on Railway
- `supervisord.conf` copy added to Dockerfile
- `pnpm-lock.yaml` updated to include puppeteer (was causing Railway build failure)
- Root cause of previous 8-redeploy spiral: Railway watches `main`, push was going to `master`

### Weekly Memory Audit
- MEMORY.md verified: fleet rebuild, cron status, infra state — all consistent
